# Introduction {#sec-ch01-introduction}

This chapter sets the stage before you touch any math or code:
why this book exists, what GPT is, and how it works at a high level.
We keep the language concrete and the diagrams simple.
The details come later.

{{< include book/01-introduction/sections/why-this-book.qmd >}}

{{< include book/01-introduction/sections/what-is-gpt.qmd >}}

{{< include book/01-introduction/sections/how-gpt-works.qmd >}}

{{< include book/01-introduction/sections/history-of-gpt.qmd >}}
